author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — owner-level architectural refactor (extracts the agentic loop across 3 seams; touches FORBIDDEN file src/pipeline.rs).

**Fix outline:** Extract pub async fn run_agentic_loop(initial_request, max_iterations: u32, event_sink: &dyn AgentEventSink, client, endpoint, headers, provider, memory_db) -> Result<Vec<Message>, String> into src/pipeline.rs (or a new src/agent_loop.rs). Define trait AgentEventSink { fn stream_text(...); fn tool_start(...); fn tool_done(...); fn response_done(...); fn api_error(...) }. Implement AgentEventSink for:
- TUI: bridges to the existing mpsc tx (src/tui/app.rs:1457-1522, max_iterations=25)
- ACP: bridges to ACP notifications (src/acp.rs:555-775, max_iterations=50)
- REPL: bridges to stdout (src/cli/repl / src/main.rs::cmd_chat)
Reconcile the iteration-cap drift (25 vs 50) by making it a single config value.

**Recommendation:** Owner-level decision on event-sink trait shape and the canonical iteration cap. Also requires unrestricted access to src/pipeline.rs (FORBIDDEN). Defer.
